## Summary

A short description of the bug.

## Affected component

- [ ] Go agent (`agent/`)
- [ ] Electron tray (`electron/`)
- [ ] Browser extension (`extension/`)
- [ ] Bundled rules (`rules/`)
- [ ] Installer / packaging
- [ ] Documentation

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error text the UI or shell
emitted. Please redact secrets, hostnames, and personal data before
pasting.

## Environment

- Secure Edge version (`/api/status` → `version`):
- Operating system (e.g. macOS 14.4, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11):
- Architecture (arm64 / amd64):
- Browser (if reporting an extension bug):

## Privacy checklist

- [ ] I have removed any real domain names, URLs, IP addresses, and
      secret material from logs / screenshots before pasting them.
- [ ] I confirm this report does not include scanned content from
      another user.
